# format: html5-dom-v1
# status: active
# include_parse_errors: true
#document
  <!doctype html>
  <html>
    <head>
    <body>
      "x"
      <div>
        "y"
      <table>
parse-errors:
  tree-builder: in-table-text-non-space-foster-parented
  tree-builder: in-table-anything-else-reprocess-in-body
  tree-builder: in-table-anything-else-reprocess-in-body
